zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，短期承压]
zh.content:
当前比特币价格在68600美元附近运行，呈现出震荡整理的态势。从4小时图来看，价格始终未能突破68800美元的短期阻力位，表明上行动能较弱。结合SMA(20)线的表现，可以看出短期内市场情绪偏向于中性。

RSI和MACD指标未提供明确的方向性信号，这意味着市场暂时缺乏足够的买卖动能，投资者应保持谨慎。当前MACD值为负，显示出一定的空头压力，但信号线尚未形成明确交叉，市场仍然处于观望阶段。

支撑位方面，68300美元附近的低点为当前的主要支撑区域，一旦跌破，可能进一步考验67800美元的强支撑。而上方68800美元仍为短期阻力，突破该位置将有助于推动价格进一步上涨。

建议短期交易者保持观望，等待价格突破关键支撑或阻力位后再做决定。若价格突破68800美元，可以考虑轻仓做多；若跌破68300美元，可考虑短期做空，止损设在69000美元附近。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently consolidating near the $68,600 level after testing a daily high of $68,633.63 and a low of $68,366.46. Price action indicates a mild bullish bias, but momentum appears limited given the small 24-hour gain of 0.32%. The proximity of the current price to the 20-period simple moving average at $68,878 suggests a potential short-term resistance, while intraday swings are being constrained within a tight range, signaling indecision among traders.  

The MACD reading of -121.72 implies bearish momentum, even though the signal line is unavailable for precise confirmation. This divergence between price stability and negative MACD highlights that while sellers are not aggressively pushing prices lower, buyers are also hesitant to commit to strong upward moves. Market participants may look for a crossover or a shift in MACD towards positive territory before confirming a resumption of bullish momentum.  

Key support zones can be identified around $68,300 and $68,100, where previous intraday lows have found buying interest. On the upside, immediate resistance is near the SMA(20) at $68,878, followed by the psychological $69,000 level. Breaching these levels with sustained volume could open the door to higher targets, while failure to hold support may trigger a deeper pullback toward $68,000 or below, testing buyers’ conviction.  

Trading strategies should emphasize caution in this consolidation phase. Short-term traders may consider entering long positions near established support levels with tight stops, aiming for the SMA and psychological resistance zones. Conversely, break-and-retest setups below support could provide opportunistic short trades. Maintaining a disciplined risk-to-reward ratio and monitoring volume and momentum indicators will be crucial, as the market remains sensitive to minor fluctuations in sentiment and technical signals.
